_comment: All user-facing text strings for gitstats3 CLI. Keys use dot notation: category.name

parser.description: Git repository statistics generator with OOP metrics analysis.
parser.paths_help: Git repository path(s) followed by output path. In --multi-repo mode: <scan-folder> <outputpath>. Otherwise: <gitpath..> <outputpath>.
parser.config_help: Override a configuration value (can be repeated)
parser.multi_repo_help: Scan folder recursively for repositories and generate reports for each
parser.export_json_help: Export metrics to JSON file in output directory
parser.export_yaml_help: Export metrics to YAML file in output directory (requires PyYAML)
parser.epilog:
examples:
  gitstats repo output                    # Generates HTML report
  gitstats --verbose repo output          # With verbose output
  gitstats --multi-repo /path/to/repos output  # Scan folder for repos
  gitstats --debug -c max_authors=50 repo output
  gitstats -c multi_repo_max_depth=5 --multi-repo /path/to/repos output

multi-repo configuration (-c key=value):
  multi_repo_max_depth=N               Maximum scan depth (default: 10)
  multi_repo_include_patterns=p1,p2    Glob patterns for dirs to include
  multi_repo_exclude_patterns=p1,p2    Glob patterns for dirs to exclude
  multi_repo_timeout=N                 Timeout per repo in seconds (default: 3600)
  multi_repo_cleanup_on_error=bool     Clean up on error (default: True)
  multi_repo_parallel=bool             Parallel processing (default: True)
  multi_repo_max_workers=N             Parallel workers (default: 4)
  multi_repo_fast_scan=bool            Concurrent discovery (default: True)
  multi_repo_batch_size=N              Batch size (default: 10)
  multi_repo_progress_interval=N       Progress interval secs (default: 5)

file extension filtering (-c key=value):
  filter_by_extensions=bool            Enable file filtering (default: True)
  allowed_extensions=.py,.js,.java     Comma-separated extensions

maintainability index (-c key=value):
  calculate_mi_per_repository=bool     Enable MI calculation (default: True)

error.invalid_config_format: FATAL: Invalid configuration format. Use key=value: {value}
error.config_min_value: FATAL: {key} must be at least 1, got: {value}
error.scan_folder_not_exist: FATAL: Scan folder does not exist: {path}
error.scan_folder_not_dir: FATAL: Scan folder is not a directory: {path}
error.scan_folder_no_read: FATAL: No read permission for scan folder: {path}
error.permission_denied_output: FATAL: Permission denied creating output directory: {path}
error.output_not_dir: FATAL: Output path is not a directory or does not exist
error.no_write_output: FATAL: No write permission for output directory: {path}
error.no_valid_repos: FATAL: No valid repositories to process
error.path_not_exist: FATAL: Git repository path does not exist: {path}
error.path_not_dir: FATAL: Git repository path is not a directory: {path}
error.path_not_git: FATAL: Path is not a git repository (no .git directory found): {path}
error.permission_denied_repo_output: FATAL: Permission denied creating repository output directory: {path}
error.error_creating_repo_output: FATAL: Error creating repository output directory {path}: {error}
error.no_write_repo_output: FATAL: No write permission for repository output directory: {path}
error.repo_not_directory: Repository path is not a directory: {path}
error.repo_not_valid_git: Path is not a valid git repository: {path}

progress.scanning_folder: Scanning folder recursively for git repositories: {path}
progress.failed_report: ✗ Failed to generate report for {name} after {time:.2f}s: {error}
progress.calculating_mi: Calculating Maintainability Index (MI) for current repository...
progress.mi_failed: ⚠️  MI calculation failed or no files found
progress.mccabe_failed: ⚠️  McCabe calculation failed or no files found
progress.halstead_failed: ⚠️  Halstead calculation failed or no files found
progress.oop_failed: ⚠️  OOP calculation failed or no files found
progress.skipping_metrics: Skipping per-repository metrics calculation (disabled in configuration)
progress.hotspot_completed: ✓ Hotspot analysis completed: {critical} critical, {high} high-risk files
progress.using_table_format: Using table-based output format (matplotlib not required)
progress.execution_time: Execution time {internal:.5f} secs, {external:.5f} secs ({percent:.2f} %%) in external commands)
progress.multi_output_header: Reports have been generated in subfolders under:
progress.parallel_info: Using parallel processing with {workers} workers, batch size: {batch}

verbose.table_format: Using table-based output format for all visualizations
verbose.repo_not_dir: Repository path is not a directory: {path}
verbose.repo_corrupted: Git repository appears to be corrupted: {path}
verbose.summary_warning: Warning: Could not generate summary report: {error}
verbose.memory_warning: Warning: High memory usage detected ({usage:.1f} MB). Consider reducing batch size or max workers.
verbose.mi_failed: ⚠️  MI calculation failed or no files found
verbose.mccabe_failed: ⚠️  McCabe calculation failed or no files found
verbose.halstead_failed: ⚠️  Halstead calculation failed or no files found
verbose.oop_failed: ⚠️  OOP calculation failed or no files found
verbose.skipping_metrics: Skipping comprehensive metrics calculation (disabled in configuration)
